2358540.name: Alveron - Withering Roots
2358540.description:
The World Tree - its roots are what connect all worlds. But the barrier between them is diluted and suddenly the young Valec is drawn from our world to the magical Lyhjem.

It is the world of the Alveri. These elf-like beings live in harmony with nature and the magic around them. Valec quickly makes the acquaintance of the priestess Alynna and her bodyguard Rina, who are on a pilgrimage, the "Dictum Journey". It is meant to secure the energy flow of the World Tree and the worlds, but they do not yet know how important their task really is.

Stranded and curious, Valec decides to accompany the two ladies to learn more about this new world. In the process, he quickly discovers that Lyhjem is not just a place of peace and idyll. Due to the disruption of the energy flow, the world tree begins to wither and the newly forged friendship between the three is put to the test. For the enemies they must face come not only from ancient myths, but also lurk in their own past.


  • 40 to 60 hours of gameplay
  • Fast-paced turn-based sideview battle system
  • Self-created pixel art
  • Hand-drawn character images
  • Character-driven story
  • Classic side quests
  • World stories (Extensive side stories)
  • Animated character dialogs
  • Small slice-of-life episodes
  • Improve your learned powers by using them
  • No random battles
  • A bit of fanservice <3
